sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes, make sure both checkboxes end up checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If a checkbox element is visible
actions: Click checkbox 1 if it is not checked
Click checkbox 2 if it is not checked

workflow.name: Checkboxes Confirmed Checked
workflow.description: Verify that both checkboxes are now in the checked state.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
